description_long: This camper is a boxy, beige recreational vehicle with a raised over-cab sleeping area and large, tinted windows on both sides. The front features a wide windshield with two wipers, rectangular headlights, and a prominent grille. The sides display multiple rectangular windows, storage compartments, and a circular entry door on the right. The rear is equipped with a vertical ladder for roof access, two red taillights, and a large window. The roof has several skylights and a small roof rack, suggesting additional storage or ventilation. The vehicle sits on four wheels, with black wheel arches and subtle orange accents on the mirrors and lights.
description: A beige, boxy camper van with large windows, a raised over-cab section, roof skylights, and a rear ladder. It features storage compartments, a side entry door, and prominent front and rear lights.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide windshield with two wipers, rectangular headlights, grille, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights two large rectangular windows, two storage compartments, and the over-cab sleeping area.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a large window, vertical ladder, two red taillights, and the roof's skylights.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals a circular entry door, two large windows, a smaller over-cab window, and the rear ladder.
attribute_window_configuration: two large rectangular windows on each side, one large front windshield, one rear window, one small over-cab window on each side
attribute_door_placement: single entry door on the right side near the center
